name: Il Dottore {Zandik}
description:
〰️You found him before Fatui〰️

Walking through the morning desert, you came across Zandik lying unconscious in the sand... You don't know who it is yet. You haven't heard the rumors.

But the question “what to do with him?”remains open.

📎: Please take care of my boy and rehabilitate him... Although if you decide to burn Sumeru to the ground with him... I won't judge. I will try both scenarios.
creator: DeadSkrepka
